error_signature: binary data missing from uploaded image
title: Binary data missing from image uploads in chat
symptom: When uploading an image to a chat in n8n, the image appears as JSON without binary data, preventing further processing.
applies_when: Using the chat node to upload images
Image is expected to be processed as binary data
not_this_if: Image uploads are working correctly in other nodes
No processing of images is required
root_cause: The chat node does not automatically include binary data in its output. To retain binary data, specific settings in the following nodes must be adjusted to ensure that all necessary input fields are included.
fix_steps: Activate the 'Include Other Input Fields' option
agent_instruction: Activate the 'Include Other Input Fields' option in the 'Set' node to retain binary data from the chat node.
